name: Shrimp Louis
recipeIngredient: 4 small Tomatoes, Cut Into Wedges & Chilled
1 1/2 cups Thinly Sliced, Peeled Cucumber, Chilled
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mustard and 1 tablespoon of water in a small bowl. Stir well.
2. Add yogurt, mayonnaise, chili sauce, paprika, and water to the bowl with mustard mixture. Stir until combined.
3. Cover and chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.
4. Bring 3 cups of water to a boil in a large saucepan.
5. Add shrimp to boiling water and cook for 3 minutes. Drain well and rinse with cold water.
6. Peel and devein the shrimp. Set aside.
7. Snap off tough ends from asparagus. Remove scales. Cover and cook in a small amount of boiling water for about 7 minutes, or until crisp-tender. Chill.
8. Arrange shrimp, asparagus, tomatoes, egg slices, and cucumber evenly on four individual lettuce-lined plates.
9. Garnish with lemon wedges. Serve with dressing.
About 189 calories per salad and about 1/4 cup of dressing.
